Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Boomloom: Think with your hands 105 upvotes, 8 comments
  2. My first patch to the Linux kernel 28 upvotes, 1 comments
  3. The paddle wheel aircraft carriers of Lake Michigan 77 upvotes, 8 comments
  4. A digital resource for studying the graffiti of Herculaneum and Pompeii 24 upvotes, 1 comments
  5. Electronics for Kids, 2nd Edition 169 upvotes, 32 comments
  6. Show HN: Termcraft – terminal-first 2D sandbox survival in Rust 112 upvotes, 20 comments
  7. Common Lisp Development Tooling 86 upvotes, 16 comments
  8. Floci – A free, open-source local AWS emulator 163 upvotes, 42 comments
  9. Some things just take time 652 upvotes, 202 comments
  10. Bayesian statistics for confused data scientists 105 upvotes, 27 comments
  11. Sashiko: An agentic Linux kernel code review system 15 upvotes, 1 comments
  12. Professional video editing, right in the browser with WebGPU and WASM 241 upvotes, 75 comments
  13. Grafeo – A fast, lean, embeddable graph database built in Rust 216 upvotes, 73 comments
  14. Hide macOS Tahoe's Menu Icons 186 upvotes, 63 comments
  15. Trivy ecosystem supply chain briefly compromised 61 upvotes, 22 comments
  16. Alpha Micro AM-1000E and AM-1200 13 upvotes, 2 comments
  17. Do Not Turn Child Protection into Internet Access Control 645 upvotes, 348 comments
  18. The three pillars of JavaScript bloat 200 upvotes, 97 comments
  19. Tinybox – A powerful computer for deep learning 466 upvotes, 274 comments
  20. Thinking Fast, Slow, and Artificial: How AI Is Reshaping Human Reasoning 135 upvotes, 71 comments
  21. How Ford burned $12B in Brazil (2021) 51 upvotes, 24 comments
  22. Cloudflare flags archive.today as "C&C/Botnet"; no longer resolves via 1.1.1.2 124 upvotes, 74 comments
  23. Chest Fridge (2009) 89 upvotes, 54 comments
  24. It's Their Mona Lisa 19 upvotes, 7 comments
  25. Cross-Model Void Convergence: GPT-5.2 and Claude Opus 4.6 Deterministic Silence 9 upvotes, 2 comments
  26. How Invisalign became the biggest user of 3D printers 157 upvotes, 117 comments
  27. Ubuntu 26.04 Ends 46 Years of Silent sudo Passwords 362 upvotes, 353 comments
  28. Linking Smaller Haskell Binaries 5 upvotes, 1 comments
  29. Training Center for Maneuvering on Manned Model Ships 8 upvotes, 5 comments
  30. HopTab–free,open source macOS app switcher and tiler that replaces Cmd+Tab 3 upvotes, 1 comments

Last generated 4:30pm, 22 March 2026. Source here.
